visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman standing in front of a retail storefront at night. She has long dark hair and wears a black long-sleeved top with ruffles. She holds two shopping bags—one yellow and one pink. To her left is a large, cheerful black bear statue wearing a yellow uniform. The lighting is bright and festive, with snowflakes visible on the glass door behind her. (2) The scene cuts to the interior of the shop, which features warm wood textures and soft pink walls. A woman in a long, light blue dress and a grey hat walks toward a pink service counter. The shop is modern and clean, with round pendant lights hanging from the ceiling. A staff member is visible behind the counter. (3) Close-up shots showcase food products, including lemon Boston pies and various tins of cookies arranged on arched shelves. The woman is seen inside the shop, tasting a cookie and reacting with a surprised, positive expression. (4) The scene transitions to an indoor living room setting. Two women sit on a grey sofa; one in a black top and the other in a white sweater and a zebra-print bucket hat. They have a sliced lemon cake and a tin of cookies on a table. They use forks to eat the cake, gesturing dynamically with their hands while discussing the food. (5) Final close-up shots show the interior of a yellow cookie tin filled with round, meat-floss flavored cookies, followed by a quick pan across the store's menu board and the outdoor bear statue again.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 台中必買. [Variety]: 肉鬆曲奇. [Variety]: 檸檬生乳波士頓派. [Subtitle]: 妹妹買了什麼. [Logo]: 鴻鼎菓子 idodo. (2) [Subtitle]: 買了一個肉鬆曲奇. (3) [Subtitle]: 跟一個檸檬波士頓派. (4) [Subtitle]: 對 他這一家好漂亮哦 是新開的店哦. (5) [Variety]: 超級讚. [Variety]: 裡面還有試吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為試吃 所以又多買一袋. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以發現他的肉鬆曲奇很好吃. (8) [Slogan]: 咪咪眼的檸檬波士頓派. (9) [Subtitle]: 那我們吃下來的話 一致好評 1-10分 我們會給... (10) [Slogan]: 9分. (11) [Subtitle]: 那它的波士頓呢 非常地輕盈 最厲害的是它裡面的生乳很清爽 不粘膩 檸檬呢 味道非常的十足. (12) [Variety]: 完美比例. (13) [Slogan]: 台灣黑熊曲奇餅 小時肉鬆.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators reviewing food, 1 staff member visible behind the counter.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black ruffled top; the other wears a white sweater and a zebra-print bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern bakery interior with pink and wood accents, illuminated by round hanging lamps, and a cozy residential living room with a sofa and coffee table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively female voice introduces the video with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, accompanied by a bright acoustic guitar melody featuring a light rhythmic beat. A subtle 'ding' sound effect highlights the opening title card. (2) A transition is marked by a soft 'whoosh' sound as the scene moves into the store interior. The speech rate remains fast and fluid, conveying excitement. (3) During the food review section, two female voices interact dynamically, with audible 'Mm' sounds signifying enjoyment. Brief percussive SFX like pops or bells punctuate the appearance of on-screen evaluation scores and emphasis text. (4) The background music continues steadily in a major key, providing a warm and positive atmosphere that supports the friendly conversational flow without overwhelming the voices.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Store Discovery -> Product Showcase -> Tasting/Evaluation -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly positive and energetic review of a bakery's specialty cookies and lemon cake, aiming to influence viewers to visit the shop in Taichung.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logos, storefront, and a positive rating for specific products mentioned by name.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-arousal audio and vibrant visual editing common in social media lifestyle content to create a strong sense of recommendation.
